62. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "# Kubernetes NoScheduleNoTraffic Taint Effect Implementation\n\n## Overview\nThis document outlines the modifications required to add support for a new Kubernetes taint effect called \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\" to the kubernetes/kubernetes v1.30.0 repository.\n\n### Taint Effect Behavior\n- **NoScheduleNoTraffic**: Prevents new pods from being scheduled (like NoSchedule) and excludes the node from Service EndpointSlices (affects traffic routing)\n- Does NOT evict existing pods (unlike NoExecute)\n- Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller\n\n---\n\n## File Modifications\n\n### 1. pkg/apis/core/types.go (line ~3177)\n**Location**: After TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule constant\n\n**Change**: Add new TaintEffect constant definition\n\n```go\n// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally remove the node from Service\n// EndpointSlices, preventing traffic from being routed to the node.\n// Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller.\nTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n```\n\n**Context**: This is where core taint effect constants are defined.\n\n---\n\n### 2. staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go (line ~3519)\n**Location**: After TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule constant (mirrors pkg/apis/core/types.go)\n\n**Change**: Add same TaintEffect constant definition\n\n```go\n// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally remove the node from Service\n// EndpointSlices, preventing traffic from being routed to the node.\n// Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller.\nTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n```\n\n**Context**: This is the versioned API types file that mirrors the core types.\n\n---\n\n### 3. pkg/util/taints/taints.go (line ~82)\n**Location**: In validateTaintEffect function\n\n**Change**: Update validation to accept NoScheduleNoTraffic effect\n\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect v1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n**Context**: This validates taint effects in the taints utility package.\n\n---\n\n### 4. staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go (line ~121)\n**Location**: In validateTaintEffect function\n\n**Change**: Update validation to accept NoScheduleNoTraffic effect\n\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect corev1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n**Context**: This validates taint effects in the kubectl taint command utilities.\n\n---\n\n### 5. pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go (line ~3857-3875)\n**Location**: In validateTaintEffect function\n\n**Change**: Update switch case and validValues slice to include NoScheduleNoTraffic\n\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect *core.TaintEffect, allowEmpty bool, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {\n\tif !allowEmpty && len(*effect) == 0 {\n\t\treturn field.ErrorList{field.Required(fldPath, \"\")}\n\t}\n\n\tallErrors := field.ErrorList{}\n\tswitch *effect {\n\t// TODO: Replace next line with subsequent commented-out line when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\tcase core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\t\t// case core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\tdefault:\n\t\tvalidValues := []core.TaintEffect{\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoExecute,\n\t\t\t// TODO: Uncomment this block when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\t\t\t// core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit,\n\t\t}\n\t\tallErrors = append(allErrors, field.NotSupported(fldPath, *effect, validValues))\n\t}\n\treturn allErrors\n}\n```\n\n**Context**: This is the core validation logic for taint effects in API validation.\n\n---\n\n### 6. pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go (line ~26)\n**Location**: In DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc function\n\n**Change**: Update filter to include NoScheduleNoTraffic effect\n\n```go\n// DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc returns the filter function that can\n// filter out the node taints that reject scheduling Pod on a Node.\nfunc DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc() func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\treturn func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\t// PodToleratesNodeTaints is interested in NoSchedule, NoScheduleNoTraffic, and NoExecute taints.\n\t\treturn t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n\t}\n}\n```\n\n**Context**: This prevents pods from being scheduled on tainted nodes. NoScheduleNoTraffic is treated like NoSchedule for scheduling purposes.\n\n---\n\n### 7. staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go (line ~188-212)\n**Location**: After node retrieval in the reconciliation logic\n\n**Change**: Add check to skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints\n\n```go\n\t\tnode, err := r.nodeLister.Get(pod.Spec.NodeName)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t// we are getting the information from the local informer,\n\t\t\t// an error different than IsNotFound should not happen\n\t\t\tif !errors.IsNotFound(err) {\n\t\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// If the Node specified by the Pod doesn't exist we want to requeue the Service so we\n\t\t\t// retry later, but also update the EndpointSlice without the problematic Pod.\n\t\t\t// Theoretically, the pod Garbage Collector will remove the Pod, but we want to avoid\n\t\t\t// situations where a reference from a Pod to a missing node can leave the EndpointSlice\n\t\t\t// stuck forever.\n\t\t\t// On the other side, if the service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses is set we just add the\n\t\t\t// Pod, since the user is explicitly indicating that the Pod address should be published.\n\t\t\tif !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node not found\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KRef(\"\", pod.Spec.NodeName))\n\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s Not Found\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, pod.Spec.NodeName))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints if PublishNotReadyAddresses is false\n\t\tif node != nil && !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n\t\t\tfor _, taint := range node.Spec.Taints {\n\t\t\t\tif taint.Effect == corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n\t\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KObj(node))\n\t\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, node.Name))\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tendpoint := podToEndpoint(pod, node, service, addressType)\n\t\tif len(endpoint.Addresses) > 0 {\n\t\t\tdesiredEndpointsByPortMap[epHash].Insert(&endpoint)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n```\n\n**Context**: This is the core logic that excludes nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints from EndpointSlices when PublishNotReadyAddresses is false. This prevents traffic from being routed to tainted nodes.\n\n---\n\n### 8. test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go (line ~422)\n**Location**: In toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects function\n\n**Change**: Update to filter for NoScheduleNoTraffic taints in addition to NoSchedule and NoExecute\n\n```go\nfunc toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects(taints []v1.Taint, tolerations []v1.Toleration) bool {\n\tfilteredTaints := []v1.Taint{}\n\tfor _, taint := range taints {\n\t\tif taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n\t\t\tfilteredTaints = append(filteredTaints, taint)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ttoleratesTaint := func(taint v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\tfor _, toleration := range tolerations {\n\t\t\tif toleration.ToleratesTaint(&taint) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n```\n\n**Context**: This is used in E2E tests to verify pod toleration of taints.\n\n---\n\n## Summary of Changes\n\n| File | Change Type | Modification |\n|------|-------------|--------------|\n| pkg/apis/core/types.go | Constant Addition | Add TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic constant |\n| staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go | Constant Addition | Add TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic constant |\n| pkg/util/taints/taints.go | Validation Update | Accept NoScheduleNoTraffic in validateTaintEffect |\n| staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go | Validation Update | Accept NoScheduleNoTraffic in validateTaintEffect |\n| pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go | Validation Update | Accept NoScheduleNoTraffic in switch case and validValues |\n| pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go | Filter Update | Include NoScheduleNoTraffic in DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc |\n| staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go | Logic Addition | Skip pods with NoScheduleNoTraffic taint from EndpointSlices |\n| test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go | Filter Update | Include NoScheduleNoTraffic in taint filtering |\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Details\n\n### Enforcement Points\n\n1. **Scheduler** (`pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go`):\n   - Prevents new pods from being scheduled on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints\n   - Requires pods to have matching tolerations\n\n2. **EndpointSlice Controller** (`staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go`):\n   - Excludes nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints from Service EndpointSlices\n   - Prevents traffic from being routed to affected nodes\n   - Respects PublishNotReadyAddresses flag for service configuration\n\n3. **Validation Layers**:\n   - API validation ensures only valid taint effects are used\n   - Taint command utilities validate effects before applying\n   - Multiple validation points ensure consistency across the codebase\n\n### Key Differences from Other Effects\n\n- **NoSchedule**: Prevents scheduling only\n- **PreferNoSchedule**: Soft constraint on scheduling\n- **NoScheduleNoTraffic**: Prevents scheduling AND excludes from traffic routing (NEW)\n- **NoExecute**: Evicts existing pods\n\n---\n\n## Files Created in /workspace\n\nAll modified code sections have been saved to /workspace with the following file names:\n- `types_1.go` - pkg/apis/core/types.go modifications\n- `types_2.go` - staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go modifications\n- `taints.go` - pkg/util/taints/taints.go modifications\n- `utils.go` - staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go modifications\n- `validation.go` - pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go modifications\n- `taint.go` - pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go modifications\n- `reconciler.go` - staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go modifications\n- `resource.go` - test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go modifications\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md"
63. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "# Patch Guide: NoScheduleNoTraffic Taint Effect Implementation\n\nThis guide provides detailed instructions for applying each patch to the Kubernetes codebase.\n\n---\n\n## Patch 1: pkg/apis/core/types.go\n\n**File Path**: `pkg/apis/core/types.go`\n**Line Number**: ~3177 (after PreferNoSchedule)\n**Type**: Constant Definition Addition\n\n### Before:\n```go\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but the scheduler tries not to schedule\n\t// new pods onto the node, rather than prohibiting new pods from scheduling\n\t// onto the node entirely. Enforced by the scheduler.\n\tTaintEffectPreferNoSchedule TaintEffect = \"PreferNoSchedule\"\n\t// NOT YET IMPLEMENTED. TODO: Uncomment field once it is implemented.\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally do not allow pods submitted to\n\t// Kubelet without going through the scheduler to start.\n\t// Enforced by Kubelet and the scheduler.\n\t// TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoAdmit\"\n\n\t// Evict any already-running pods that do not tolerate the taint.\n\t// Currently enforced by NodeController.\n\tTaintEffectNoExecute TaintEffect = \"NoExecute\"\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but the scheduler tries not to schedule\n\t// new pods onto the node, rather than prohibiting new pods from scheduling\n\t// onto the node entirely. Enforced by the scheduler.\n\tTaintEffectPreferNoSchedule TaintEffect = \"PreferNoSchedule\"\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally remove the node from Service\n\t// EndpointSlices, preventing traffic from being routed to the node.\n\t// Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller.\n\tTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n\t// NOT YET IMPLEMENTED. TODO: Uncomment field once it is implemented.\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally do not allow pods submitted to\n\t// Kubelet without going through the scheduler to start.\n\t// Enforced by Kubelet and the scheduler.\n\t// TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoAdmit\"\n\n\t// Evict any already-running pods that do not tolerate the taint.\n\t// Currently enforced by NodeController.\n\tTaintEffectNoExecute TaintEffect = \"NoExecute\"\n```\n\n---\n\n## Patch 2: staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go\n\n**File Path**: `staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go`\n**Line Number**: ~3519 (after PreferNoSchedule)\n**Type**: Constant Definition Addition (mirrors Patch 1)\n\n### Before:\n```go\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but the scheduler tries not to schedule\n\t// new pods onto the node, rather than prohibiting new pods from scheduling\n\t// onto the node entirely. Enforced by the scheduler.\n\tTaintEffectPreferNoSchedule TaintEffect = \"PreferNoSchedule\"\n\t// NOT YET IMPLEMENTED. TODO: Uncomment field once it is implemented.\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally do not allow pods submitted to\n\t// Kubelet without going through the scheduler to start.\n\t// Enforced by Kubelet and the scheduler.\n\t// TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoAdmit\"\n\n\t// Evict any already-running pods that do not tolerate the taint.\n\t// Currently enforced by NodeController.\n\tTaintEffectNoExecute TaintEffect = \"NoExecute\"\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but the scheduler tries not to schedule\n\t// new pods onto the node, rather than prohibiting new pods from scheduling\n\t// onto the node entirely. Enforced by the scheduler.\n\tTaintEffectPreferNoSchedule TaintEffect = \"PreferNoSchedule\"\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally remove the node from Service\n\t// EndpointSlices, preventing traffic from being routed to the node.\n\t// Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller.\n\tTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n\t// NOT YET IMPLEMENTED. TODO: Uncomment field once it is implemented.\n\t// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally do not allow pods submitted to\n\t// Kubelet without going through the scheduler to start.\n\t// Enforced by Kubelet and the scheduler.\n\t// TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoAdmit\"\n\n\t// Evict any already-running pods that do not tolerate the taint.\n\t// Currently enforced by NodeController.\n\tTaintEffectNoExecute TaintEffect = \"NoExecute\"\n```\n\n---\n\n## Patch 3: pkg/util/taints/taints.go\n\n**File Path**: `pkg/util/taints/taints.go`\n**Line Number**: ~82\n**Type**: Validation Function Update\n\n### Before:\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect v1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect v1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n**Change Detail**: Add `&& effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to the condition on line 82.\n\n---\n\n## Patch 4: staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go\n\n**File Path**: `staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go`\n**Line Number**: ~121\n**Type**: Validation Function Update\n\n### Before:\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect corev1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect corev1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n**Change Detail**: Add `&& effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to the condition on line 121. (Note: uses `corev1` package instead of `v1`.)\n\n---\n\n## Patch 5: pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go\n\n**File Path**: `pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go`\n**Line Number**: ~3858-3879\n**Type**: Validation Function Update (Switch Case and Values Slice)\n\n### Before:\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect *core.TaintEffect, allowEmpty bool, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {\n\tif !allowEmpty && len(*effect) == 0 {\n\t\treturn field.ErrorList{field.Required(fldPath, \"\")}\n\t}\n\n\tallErrors := field.ErrorList{}\n\tswitch *effect {\n\t// TODO: Replace next line with subsequent commented-out line when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\tcase core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\t\t// case core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\tdefault:\n\t\tvalidValues := []core.TaintEffect{\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoExecute,\n\t\t\t// TODO: Uncomment this block when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\t\t\t// core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit,\n\t\t}\n\t\tallErrors = append(allErrors, field.NotSupported(fldPath, *effect, validValues))\n\t}\n\treturn allErrors\n}\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect *core.TaintEffect, allowEmpty bool, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {\n\tif !allowEmpty && len(*effect) == 0 {\n\t\treturn field.ErrorList{field.Required(fldPath, \"\")}\n\t}\n\n\tallErrors := field.ErrorList{}\n\tswitch *effect {\n\t// TODO: Replace next line with subsequent commented-out line when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\tcase core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\t\t// case core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\tdefault:\n\t\tvalidValues := []core.TaintEffect{\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoExecute,\n\t\t\t// TODO: Uncomment this block when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\t\t\t// core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit,\n\t\t}\n\t\tallErrors = append(allErrors, field.NotSupported(fldPath, *effect, validValues))\n\t}\n\treturn allErrors\n}\n```\n\n**Change Details**:\n1. Line 3866: Add `core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to the case clause\n2. Line 3871: Add `core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic,` to the validValues slice\n\n---\n\n## Patch 6: pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go\n\n**File Path**: `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go`\n**Line Number**: ~26\n**Type**: Filter Function Update\n\n### Before:\n```go\n// DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc returns the filter function that can\n// filter out the node taints that reject scheduling Pod on a Node.\nfunc DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc() func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\treturn func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\t// PodToleratesNodeTaints is only interested in NoSchedule and NoExecute taints.\n\t\treturn t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n\t}\n}\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\n// DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc returns the filter function that can\n// filter out the node taints that reject scheduling Pod on a Node.\nfunc DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc() func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\treturn func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\t// PodToleratesNodeTaints is interested in NoSchedule, NoScheduleNoTraffic, and NoExecute taints.\n\t\treturn t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n\t}\n}\n```\n\n**Change Details**:\n1. Update the comment on line 25 to mention NoScheduleNoTraffic\n2. Add `|| t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to the return statement\n\n---\n\n## Patch 7: staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go\n\n**File Path**: `staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go`\n**Line Number**: ~207 (after the PublishNotReadyAddresses check)\n**Type**: Logic Addition (New conditional block)\n\n### Before:\n```go\n\t\t}\n\t\tendpoint := podToEndpoint(pod, node, service, addressType)\n\t\tif len(endpoint.Addresses) > 0 {\n\t\t\tdesiredEndpointsByPortMap[epHash].Insert(&endpoint)\n\t\t}\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints if PublishNotReadyAddresses is false\n\t\tif node != nil && !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n\t\t\tfor _, taint := range node.Spec.Taints {\n\t\t\t\tif taint.Effect == corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n\t\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KObj(node))\n\t\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, node.Name))\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tendpoint := podToEndpoint(pod, node, service, addressType)\n\t\tif len(endpoint.Addresses) > 0 {\n\t\t\tdesiredEndpointsByPortMap[epHash].Insert(&endpoint)\n\t\t}\n```\n\n**Change Details**:\n1. Add a check after the node retrieval and PublishNotReadyAddresses check\n2. If the node has a NoScheduleNoTraffic taint, skip adding this pod to the endpoints\n3. Log the skip action for debugging purposes\n4. Add error to the error slice for tracking\n\n**Important**: This check respects the `PublishNotReadyAddresses` flag - nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints are only excluded from endpoints when `PublishNotReadyAddresses` is false.\n\n---\n\n## Patch 8: test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go\n\n**File Path**: `test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go`\n**Line Number**: ~422\n**Type**: Taint Filtering Update\n\n### Before:\n```go\nfunc toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects(taints []v1.Taint, tolerations []v1.Toleration) bool {\n\tfilteredTaints := []v1.Taint{}\n\tfor _, taint := range taints {\n\t\tif taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule {\n\t\t\tfilteredTaints = append(filteredTaints, taint)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ttoleratesTaint := func(taint v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\tfor _, toleration := range tolerations {\n\t\t\tif toleration.ToleratesTaint(&taint) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n```\n\n### After:\n```go\nfunc toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects(taints []v1.Taint, tolerations []v1.Toleration) bool {\n\tfilteredTaints := []v1.Taint{}\n\tfor _, taint := range taints {\n\t\tif taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n\t\t\tfilteredTaints = append(filteredTaints, taint)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ttoleratesTaint := func(taint v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\tfor _, toleration := range tolerations {\n\t\t\tif toleration.ToleratesTaint(&taint) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n```\n\n**Change Detail**: Add `|| taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to the condition on line 422.\n\n---\n\n## Summary Table\n\n| # | File | Change Type | Key Change |\n|---|------|------------|-----------|\n| 1 | pkg/apis/core/types.go | Add Constant | `TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"` |\n| 2 | staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go | Add Constant | Same as #1 (mirrored) |\n| 3 | pkg/util/taints/taints.go | Update Validation | Add `effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` check |\n| 4 | staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go | Update Validation | Add `effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` check |\n| 5 | pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go | Update Switch Case & Values | Add NoScheduleNoTraffic to case and validValues |\n| 6 | pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go | Update Filter | Add NoScheduleNoTraffic to scheduling rejection filter |\n| 7 | staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go | Add Logic Block | Skip pods on NoScheduleNoTraffic nodes from endpoints |\n| 8 | test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go | Update Filter | Add NoScheduleNoTraffic to taint filtering |\n\n---\n\n## Testing Recommendations\n\n1. **Unit Tests**: Update existing taint validation tests to include NoScheduleNoTraffic\n2. **Integration Tests**: Test that pods cannot be scheduled on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints\n3. **E2E Tests**: Test that endpoints are excluded from Service EndpointSlices when nodes have NoScheduleNoTraffic taints\n4. **Toleration Tests**: Test that pods with matching tolerations can still be scheduled\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n- [ ] All 8 files have been modified\n- [ ] Type constants are defined in both types.go files\n- [ ] All validation functions accept the new effect\n- [ ] Scheduler filter includes the new effect\n- [ ] EndpointSlice reconciler skips pods on tainted nodes\n- [ ] E2E test framework includes the new effect in taint filtering\n- [ ] Code compiles without errors\n- [ ] Existing tests pass\n- [ ] New behavior is tested with E2E tests\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/PATCH_GUIDE.md"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/PATCH_GUIDE.md"

Enforced by the scheduler.\n    10\u2192TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule TaintEffect = \"PreferNoSchedule\"\n    11\u2192// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally remove the node from Service\n    12\u2192// EndpointSlices, preventing traffic from being routed to the node.\n    13\u2192// Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller.\n    14\u2192TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n    15\u2192// NOT YET IMPLEMENTED. TODO: Uncomment field once it is implemented.\n    16\u2192// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally do not allow pods submitted to\n    17\u2192// Kubelet without going through the scheduler to start.\n    18\u2192// Enforced by Kubelet and the scheduler.\n    19\u2192// TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoAdmit\"\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192// Evict any already-running pods that do not tolerate the taint.\n    22\u2192// Currently enforced by NodeController.\n    23\u2192TaintEffectNoExecute TaintEffect = \"NoExecute\"\n    24\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. {
  "file_path": "/workspace/validation.go"
}

"     1\u2192// File: staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go (lines 180-212)\n     2\u2192// Enhanced reconciliation logic to skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints\n     3\u2192\n     4\u2192\t\tnode, err := r.nodeLister.Get(pod.Spec.NodeName)\n     5\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n     6\u2192\t\t\t// we are getting the information from the local informer,\n     7\u2192\t\t\t// an error different than IsNotFound should not happen\n     8\u2192\t\t\tif !errors.IsNotFound(err) {\n     9\u2192\t\t\t\treturn err\n    10\u2192\t\t\t}\n    11\u2192\t\t\t// If the Node specified by the Pod doesn't exist we want to requeue the Service so we\n    12\u2192\t\t\t// retry later, but also update the EndpointSlice without the problematic Pod.\n    13\u2192\t\t\t// Theoretically, the pod Garbage Collector will remove the Pod, but we want to avoid\n    14\u2192\t\t\t// situations where a reference from a Pod to a missing node can leave the EndpointSlice\n    15\u2192\t\t\t// stuck forever.\n    16\u2192\t\t\t// On the other side, if the service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses is set we just add the\n    17\u2192\t\t\t// Pod, since the user is explicitly indicating that the Pod address should be published.\n    18\u2192\t\t\tif !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n    19\u2192\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node not found\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KRef(\"\", pod.Spec.NodeName))\n    20\u2192\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s Not Found\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, pod.Spec.NodeName))\n    21\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue\n    22\u2192\t\t\t}\n    23\u2192\t\t}\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192\t\t// Skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints if PublishNotReadyAddresses is false\n    26\u2192\t\tif node != nil && !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n    27\u2192\t\t\tfor _, taint := range node.Spec.Taints {\n    28\u2192\t\t\t\tif taint.Effect == corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n    29\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KObj(node))\n    30\u2192\t\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, node.Name))\n    31\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n    32\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    33\u2192\t\t\t}\n    34\u2192\t\t}\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192\t\tendpoint := podToEndpoint(pod, node, service, addressType)\n    37\u2192\t\tif len(endpoint.Addresses) > 0 {\n    38\u2192\t\t\tdesiredEndpointsByPortMap[epHash].Insert(&endpoint)\n    39\u2192\t\t}\n    40\u2192\t}\n    41\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

{
  "content": "# Files Index: NoScheduleNoTraffic Implementation\n\n## Overview\nThis index provides a complete mapping of all modified files in the Kubernetes v1.30.0 codebase for the NoScheduleNoTraffic taint effect implementation.\n\n---\n\n## Modified Files in Kubernetes Repository\n\n### 1. Core Type Definitions\n\n#### File: `pkg/apis/core/types.go`\n- **Purpose**: Define the TaintEffect constant for the core API\n- **Location**: Line ~3177 (after TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule)\n- **Changes**: Add TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic constant definition\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/types_1.go`\n\n#### File: `staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go`\n- **Purpose**: Define the TaintEffect constant for the versioned API (v1)\n- **Location**: Line ~3519 (after TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule)\n- **Changes**: Add TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic constant definition (mirrors types.go)\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/types_2.go`\n\n---\n\n### 2. Validation Functions\n\n#### File: `pkg/util/taints/taints.go`\n- **Purpose**: Validate taint effects in the taints utility package\n- **Location**: Line ~82 (in validateTaintEffect function)\n- **Changes**: Update condition to accept NoScheduleNoTraffic effect\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/taints.go`\n\n#### File: `staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go`\n- **Purpose**: Validate taint effects in kubectl taint command utilities\n- **Location**: Line ~121 (in validateTaintEffect function)\n- **Changes**: Update condition to accept NoScheduleNoTraffic effect\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/utils.go`\n\n#### File: `pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go`\n- **Purpose**: Validate taint effects in API validation layer\n- **Location**: Lines ~3858-3879 (in validateTaintEffect function)\n- **Changes**: Update switch case and validValues slice to include NoScheduleNoTraffic\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/validation.go`\n\n---\n\n### 3. Scheduler and Endpoint Slice\n\n#### File: `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go`\n- **Purpose**: Filter taints that prevent pod scheduling\n- **Location**: Line ~26 (in DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc function)\n- **Changes**: Update filter to include NoScheduleNoTraffic in scheduling rejection criteria\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/taint.go`\n\n#### File: `staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go`\n- **Purpose**: Reconcile service endpoints and exclude nodes with certain taints\n- **Location**: Lines ~207-212 (after PublishNotReadyAddresses check in pod processing)\n- **Changes**: Add logic to skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints from EndpointSlices\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/reconciler.go`\n\n---\n\n### 4. E2E Testing\n\n#### File: `test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go`\n- **Purpose**: E2E test utilities for node resource operations\n- **Location**: Line ~422 (in toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects function)\n- **Changes**: Update taint filtering to include NoScheduleNoTraffic\n- **Saved As**: `/workspace/resource.go`\n\n---\n\n## Summary Statistics\n\n| Category | Count | Files |\n|----------|-------|-------|\n| Type Definitions | 2 | types.go, api/core/v1/types.go |\n| Validation Functions | 3 | taints.go, taint/utils.go, validation.go |\n| Core Logic | 2 | taint.go (scheduler), reconciler.go (endpoints) |\n| Testing | 1 | resource.go |\n| **Total** | **8** | - |\n\n---\n\n## File Relationships\n\n```\nType Definitions (2 files)\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 pkg/apis/core/types.go\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go\n\nValidation Layer (3 files)\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 pkg/util/taints/taints.go\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go\n\nCore Implementation (2 files)\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Prevents scheduling on tainted nodes\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go\n    \u2514\u2500\u2500 Excludes nodes from service endpoints\n\nTesting (1 file)\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go\n    \u2514\u2500\u2500 Framework utilities for E2E tests\n```\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Flow\n\n```\n1. User applies NoScheduleNoTraffic taint to a node\n   \u2193\n2. Validation layer (3 files) accepts the taint effect\n   - taints.go: Validates taint spec\n   - utils.go: Validates kubectl taint command\n   - validation.go: Validates API requests\n   \u2193\n3. Scheduler prevents pod scheduling (taint.go)\n   - DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc includes NoScheduleNoTraffic\n   - Pods without tolerations cannot be scheduled\n   \u2193\n4. EndpointSlice controller excludes node (reconciler.go)\n   - Scans node taints for NoScheduleNoTraffic\n   - Skips pods on tainted node from endpoints\n   - Prevents traffic routing to node\n   \u2193\n5. E2E tests verify behavior (resource.go)\n   - Test framework understands NoScheduleNoTraffic\n   - Tests can verify pod toleration and endpoint exclusion\n```\n\n---\n\n## Code Modification Patterns\n\n### Pattern 1: Constant Definition\n**Files**: types.go, api/core/v1/types.go\n```go\nTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n```\n\n### Pattern 2: Validation Condition\n**Files**: taints.go, utils.go\n```go\nif effect != v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule &&\n   effect != v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule &&\n   effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic &&  // NEW\n   effect != v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n```\n\n### Pattern 3: Switch Case\n**File**: validation.go\n```go\ncase core.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n     core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n     core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic,  // NEW\n     core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n```\n\n### Pattern 4: Filter Logic\n**File**: taint.go\n```go\nreturn t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule ||\n       t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic ||  // NEW\n       t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n```\n\n### Pattern 5: New Conditional Block\n**File**: reconciler.go\n```go\nif node != nil && !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n    for _, taint := range node.Spec.Taints {\n        if taint.Effect == corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n            // Skip pod from endpoints\n            continue\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Testing Touchpoints\n\n### Unit Tests to Update\n1. **Taint validation tests**: `pkg/util/taints/taints_test.go`\n   - Update to include NoScheduleNoTraffic in valid effects\n\n2. **API validation tests**: `pkg/apis/core/validation/validation_test.go`\n   - Add test cases for NoScheduleNoTraffic validation\n\n3. **Scheduler tests**: `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint_test.go`\n   - Verify scheduling filter includes NoScheduleNoTraffic\n\n4. **EndpointSlice tests**: `staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler_test.go`\n   - Test endpoint exclusion logic for NoScheduleNoTraffic nodes\n\n### E2E Tests to Create\n1. Test scheduling rejection for NoScheduleNoTraffic taints\n2. Test toleration acceptance for NoScheduleNoTraffic taints\n3. Test endpoint slice exclusion for NoScheduleNoTraffic nodes\n4. Test PublishNotReadyAddresses interaction with NoScheduleNoTraffic\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n### Code Changes\n- [ ] All 8 files have been modified according to the patch guide\n- [ ] Type constants are defined in both types.go files (matching)\n- [ ] All validation functions accept the new effect\n- [ ] Scheduler filter includes NoScheduleNoTraffic\n- [ ] EndpointSlice reconciler skips tainted pods\n- [ ] E2E test framework includes NoScheduleNoTraffic\n\n### Build Verification\n- [ ] Code compiles without errors\n- [ ] No import errors or undefined references\n- [ ] gofmt compliance (if using code formatter)\n\n### Testing\n- [ ] Existing unit tests pass\n- [ ] Existing E2E tests pass\n- [ ] New tests for NoScheduleNoTraffic feature added\n- [ ] Backward compatibility verified\n\n### Code Review\n- [ ] Comments explain the new taint effect purpose\n- [ ] Logging is added for debugging endpoint exclusion\n- [ ] Error messages are clear and informative\n- [ ] Code follows Kubernetes patterns and conventions\n\n---\n\n## Files Created in /workspace\n\nAll modified code sections and documentation:\n\n1. **Code Modifications**:\n   - `/workspace/types_1.go` - pkg/apis/core/types.go modifications\n   - `/workspace/types_2.go` - staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go modifications\n   - `/workspace/taints.go` - pkg/util/taints/taints.go modifications\n   - `/workspace/utils.go` - staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go modifications\n   - `/workspace/validation.go` - pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go modifications\n   - `/workspace/taint.go` - pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go modifications\n   - `/workspace/reconciler.go` - staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go modifications\n   - `/workspace/resource.go` - test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go modifications\n\n2. **Documentation**:\n   - `/workspace/MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md` - Comprehensive overview of all changes\n   - `/workspace/PATCH_GUIDE.md` - Detailed before/after patches for each file\n   - `/workspace/FILES_INDEX.md` - This file\n\n---\n\n## Integration Notes\n\n### Dependency Chain\n1. Type constants must be defined first (types.go files)\n2. Validation must be updated to recognize the new constant\n3. Scheduler and endpoint controller must be updated to use it\n4. Tests must be updated to account for the new effect\n\n### Backward Compatibility\n- No existing taint effects are modified\n- New effect is purely additive\n- Existing code paths remain unchanged\n- Services without NoScheduleNoTraffic nodes are unaffected\n\n### Performance Implications\n- Minimal: Additional condition check in validation (O(1))\n- Minimal: Additional loop iteration in endpoint reconciliation\n- No changes to hot paths or performance-critical code\n\n---\n\n## Quick Reference\n\n### Taint Effect Values\n| Effect | Prevents Scheduling | Evicts Pods | Excludes Endpoints |\n|--------|-------------------|------------|------------------|\n| NoSchedule | Yes | No | No |\n| PreferNoSchedule | Soft | No | No |\n| NoScheduleNoTraffic | Yes | No | **Yes** |\n| NoExecute | Yes | Yes | N/A |\n\n### Code Locations Quick Reference\n| Task | File | Line |\n|------|------|------|\n| Define constant | types.go | ~3177 |\n| Define constant (v1) | api/core/v1/types.go | ~3519 |\n| Validate taint spec | taints.go | ~82 |\n| Validate kubectl cmd | taint/utils.go | ~121 |\n| Validate API | validation.go | ~3858 |\n| Scheduler filter | taint.go | ~26 |\n| Endpoint logic | reconciler.go | ~207 |\n| E2E testing | resource.go | ~422 |\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/FILES_INDEX.md"
}

  "content": "# Complete Code Reference: NoScheduleNoTraffic Implementation\n\nThis document provides complete, ready-to-apply code snippets for the NoScheduleNoTraffic taint effect implementation.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Type Definitions\n\n### File: pkg/apis/core/types.go\n**Location**: After line 3176 (TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule)\n\n```go\n// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally remove the node from Service\n// EndpointSlices, preventing traffic from being routed to the node.\n// Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller.\nTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n```\n\n### File: staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go\n**Location**: After line 3518 (TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule)\n\n```go\n// Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but additionally remove the node from Service\n// EndpointSlices, preventing traffic from being routed to the node.\n// Enforced by the scheduler and endpoint slice controller.\nTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n```\n\n---\n\n## 2. Validation Functions\n\n### File: pkg/util/taints/taints.go\n**Location**: Line 82 (validateTaintEffect function)\n\n**Original:**\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect v1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n**Updated:**\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect v1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic && effect != v1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### File: staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go\n**Location**: Line 121 (validateTaintEffect function)\n\n**Original:**\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect corev1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n**Updated:**\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect corev1.TaintEffect) error {\n\tif effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic && effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoExecute {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid taint effect: %v, unsupported taint effect\", effect)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### File: pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go\n**Location**: Lines 3858-3879 (validateTaintEffect function)\n\n**Original:**\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect *core.TaintEffect, allowEmpty bool, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {\n\tif !allowEmpty && len(*effect) == 0 {\n\t\treturn field.ErrorList{field.Required(fldPath, \"\")}\n\t}\n\n\tallErrors := field.ErrorList{}\n\tswitch *effect {\n\t// TODO: Replace next line with subsequent commented-out line when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\tcase core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\t\t// case core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\tdefault:\n\t\tvalidValues := []core.TaintEffect{\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoExecute,\n\t\t\t// TODO: Uncomment this block when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\t\t\t// core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit,\n\t\t}\n\t\tallErrors = append(allErrors, field.NotSupported(fldPath, *effect, validValues))\n\t}\n\treturn allErrors\n}\n```\n\n**Updated:**\n```go\nfunc validateTaintEffect(effect *core.TaintEffect, allowEmpty bool, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {\n\tif !allowEmpty && len(*effect) == 0 {\n\t\treturn field.ErrorList{field.Required(fldPath, \"\")}\n\t}\n\n\tallErrors := field.ErrorList{}\n\tswitch *effect {\n\t// TODO: Replace next line with subsequent commented-out line when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\tcase core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\t\t// case core.TaintEffectNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule, core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit, core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n\tdefault:\n\t\tvalidValues := []core.TaintEffect{\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic,\n\t\t\tcore.TaintEffectNoExecute,\n\t\t\t// TODO: Uncomment this block when implement TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit.\n\t\t\t// core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoAdmit,\n\t\t}\n\t\tallErrors = append(allErrors, field.NotSupported(fldPath, *effect, validValues))\n\t}\n\treturn allErrors\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. Scheduler Filter\n\n### File: pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go\n**Location**: Lines 21-28 (DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc function)\n\n**Original:**\n```go\n// DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc returns the filter function that can\n// filter out the node taints that reject scheduling Pod on a Node.\nfunc DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc() func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\treturn func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\t// PodToleratesNodeTaints is only interested in NoSchedule and NoExecute taints.\n\t\treturn t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n\t}\n}\n```\n\n**Updated:**\n```go\n// DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc returns the filter function that can\n// filter out the node taints that reject scheduling Pod on a Node.\nfunc DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc() func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\treturn func(t *v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\t// PodToleratesNodeTaints is interested in NoSchedule, NoScheduleNoTraffic, and NoExecute taints.\n\t\treturn t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic || t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n\t}\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. EndpointSlice Reconciliation\n\n### File: staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go\n**Location**: After line 207 (after PublishNotReadyAddresses check)\n\n**Insert the following code block:**\n\n```go\n\t\t// Skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints if PublishNotReadyAddresses is false\n\t\tif node != nil && !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n\t\t\tfor _, taint := range node.Spec.Taints {\n\t\t\t\tif taint.Effect == corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n\t\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KObj(node))\n\t\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, node.Name))\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n```\n\n**Context (before and after):**\n```go\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// [INSERT NEW CODE BLOCK HERE]\n\n\t\tendpoint := podToEndpoint(pod, node, service, addressType)\n\t\tif len(endpoint.Addresses) > 0 {\n\t\t\tdesiredEndpointsByPortMap[epHash].Insert(&endpoint)\n\t\t}\n```\n\n**Full context for reconciler.go:**\n```go\n\t\tnode, err := r.nodeLister.Get(pod.Spec.NodeName)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t// we are getting the information from the local informer,\n\t\t\t// an error different than IsNotFound should not happen\n\t\t\tif !errors.IsNotFound(err) {\n\t\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// If the Node specified by the Pod doesn't exist we want to requeue the Service so we\n\t\t\t// retry later, but also update the EndpointSlice without the problematic Pod.\n\t\t\t// Theoretically, the pod Garbage Collector will remove the Pod, but we want to avoid\n\t\t\t// situations where a reference from a Pod to a missing node can leave the EndpointSlice\n\t\t\t// stuck forever.\n\t\t\t// On the other side, if the service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses is set we just add the\n\t\t\t// Pod, since the user is explicitly indicating that the Pod address should be published.\n\t\t\tif !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node not found\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KRef(\"\", pod.Spec.NodeName))\n\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s Not Found\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, pod.Spec.NodeName))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Skip pods on nodes with NoScheduleNoTraffic taints if PublishNotReadyAddresses is false\n\t\tif node != nil && !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n\t\t\tfor _, taint := range node.Spec.Taints {\n\t\t\t\tif taint.Effect == corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n\t\t\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"skipping Pod for Service, Node has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", \"pod\", klog.KObj(pod), \"service\", klog.KObj(service), \"node\", klog.KObj(node))\n\t\t\t\t\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\"skipping Pod %s for Service %s/%s: Node %s has NoScheduleNoTraffic taint\", pod.Name, service.Namespace, service.Name, node.Name))\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tendpoint := podToEndpoint(pod, node, service, addressType)\n\t\tif len(endpoint.Addresses) > 0 {\n\t\t\tdesiredEndpointsByPortMap[epHash].Insert(&endpoint)\n\t\t}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. E2E Testing Framework\n\n### File: test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go\n**Location**: Line 422 (in toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects function)\n\n**Original:**\n```go\nfunc toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects(taints []v1.Taint, tolerations []v1.Toleration) bool {\n\tfilteredTaints := []v1.Taint{}\n\tfor _, taint := range taints {\n\t\tif taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule {\n\t\t\tfilteredTaints = append(filteredTaints, taint)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ttoleratesTaint := func(taint v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\tfor _, toleration := range tolerations {\n\t\t\tif toleration.ToleratesTaint(&taint) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n```\n\n**Updated:**\n```go\nfunc toleratesTaintsWithNoScheduleNoExecuteEffects(taints []v1.Taint, tolerations []v1.Toleration) bool {\n\tfilteredTaints := []v1.Taint{}\n\tfor _, taint := range taints {\n\t\tif taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoExecute || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule || taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n\t\t\tfilteredTaints = append(filteredTaints, taint)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ttoleratesTaint := func(taint v1.Taint) bool {\n\t\tfor _, toleration := range tolerations {\n\t\t\tif toleration.ToleratesTaint(&taint) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Summary of Changes\n\n### Type Definitions (2 files)\n- Add constant: `TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"`\n\n### Validation (3 files)\n- Add `effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` check to conditions\n- Add `core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to switch case and validValues slice\n\n### Scheduler (1 file)\n- Add `|| t.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to filter condition\n\n### EndpointSlice (1 file)\n- Add new conditional block to skip pods on NoScheduleNoTraffic nodes\n\n### Testing (1 file)\n- Add `|| taint.Effect == v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` to taint filter\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Order\n\n1. **First**: Update type definition files (types.go, api/core/v1/types.go)\n   - Makes the constant available throughout the codebase\n   - Allows compilation of validation code\n\n2. **Second**: Update validation files (3 validation functions)\n   - Ensures the new taint effect is recognized as valid\n   - Prevents errors when applying taints\n\n3. **Third**: Update core logic files (scheduler, endpoint reconciler)\n   - Implements the behavior for the new effect\n   - Ensures proper enforcement\n\n4. **Fourth**: Update test framework (E2E tests)\n   - Enables E2E tests to work with the new effect\n   - Allows verification of behavior\n\n---\n\n## Testing the Implementation\n\n### Manual Testing\n\n1. **Create a node with NoScheduleNoTraffic taint:**\n```bash\nkubectl taint nodes node-name schedulingtaint=true:NoScheduleNoTraffic\n```\n\n2. **Try to schedule a pod without toleration:**\n```bash\nkubectl run test-pod --image=nginx\n# Expected: Pod should not be scheduled on tainted node\n```\n\n3. **Create a pod with matching toleration:**\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: Pod\nmetadata:\n  name: tolerant-pod\nspec:\n  tolerations:\n  - key: schedulingtaint\n    operator: Equal\n    value: \"true\"\n    effect: NoScheduleNoTraffic\n  containers:\n  - name: nginx\n    image: nginx\n```\n\n4. **Verify endpoint exclusion:**\n```bash\nkubectl get endpoints\n# Expected: Service endpoints should not include pods on NoScheduleNoTraffic node\n```\n\n### Automated Testing\n\n```bash\n# Run unit tests\ngo test ./pkg/util/taints/...\ngo test ./pkg/apis/core/validation/...\ngo test ./pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/...\ngo test ./staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/...\n\n# Run E2E tests (after building)\n./hack/gke-e2e.sh --test-grep=\"NoScheduleNoTraffic|Taint\"\n```\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n- [ ] All constant definitions added to both types.go files\n- [ ] All validation functions accept NoScheduleNoTraffic\n- [ ] Scheduler filter includes NoScheduleNoTraffic\n- [ ] EndpointSlice reconciler skips NoScheduleNoTraffic nodes\n- [ ] E2E test framework includes NoScheduleNoTraffic\n- [ ] Code compiles without errors\n- [ ] Existing tests pass\n- [ ] Manual tests pass\n- [ ] E2E tests pass\n\n---\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### Compilation Error: \"undefined TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n- Ensure types.go files are updated first\n- Check that the constant is defined in the correct package\n- Verify package imports are correct\n\n### Validation Error: \"unsupported taint effect\"\n- Check that all validation functions have been updated\n- Verify the condition checks include NoScheduleNoTraffic\n- Look for hardcoded taint effect lists\n\n### Pods Not Being Excluded from Endpoints\n- Verify reconciler.go has been updated\n- Check node has the taint correctly applied\n- Verify PublishNotReadyAddresses is false for the service\n- Check logs for \"skipping Pod\" messages\n\n### Pods Still Being Scheduled on Tainted Nodes\n- Verify taint.go scheduler filter has been updated\n- Check scheduler pods for errors\n- Verify pods lack matching tolerations\n\n---\n\n## Performance Impact\n\nThe implementation has minimal performance impact:\n- **Type definitions**: No runtime impact\n- **Validation**: One additional equality check (O(1))\n- **Scheduler**: One additional condition in filter (O(1))\n- **EndpointSlice**: Additional loop iteration per pod (O(n) where n = number of taints per node, typically < 10)\n\n---\n\n## Rollout Plan\n\n1. **Phase 1**: Update code and run unit tests\n2. **Phase 2**: Build and run E2E tests\n3. **Phase 3**: Deploy to staging cluster\n4. **Phase 4**: Validate with test scenarios\n5. **Phase 5**: Roll out to production with feature flag (if desired)\n6. **Phase 6**: Monitor for issues\n\n---\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md"
69. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "ls -lah /workspace/*.{go,md} 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $9, \"(\" $5 \")\"}'",
  "description": "List all created files in workspace"
}
Output
"/workspace/COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md (15K)\n/workspace/FILES_INDEX.md (10K)\n/workspace/MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md (11K)\n/workspace/PATCH_GUIDE.md (15K)\n/workspace/reconciler.go (2.1K)\n/workspace/resource.go (676)\n/workspace/taint.go (616)\n/workspace/taints.go (415)\n/workspace/types_1.go (1.3K)\n/workspace/types_2.go (1.4K)\n/workspace/utils.go (461)\n/workspace/validation.go (1.2K)"
70. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "# NoScheduleNoTraffic Taint Effect Implementation\n\nComplete implementation guide and code modifications for adding the `NoScheduleNoTraffic` taint effect to Kubernetes v1.30.0.\n\n## Overview\n\nThis package contains all necessary code modifications to implement the new `NoScheduleNoTraffic` taint effect in Kubernetes. This taint effect:\n\n- **Prevents pod scheduling** on the tainted node (like `NoSchedule`)\n- **Excludes the node from Service EndpointSlices** (affects traffic routing)\n- **Does NOT evict existing pods** (unlike `NoExecute`)\n\n## Quick Start\n\n### For Understanding the Changes\n1. Start with **MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md** - High-level overview\n2. Read **FILES_INDEX.md** - Where each change goes\n3. Review **PATCH_GUIDE.md** - Detailed before/after diffs\n\n### For Applying the Changes\n1. Use **COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md** - Ready-to-apply code snippets\n2. Follow the file-by-file modification instructions\n3. Use the code snippets in this directory as reference\n\n### For Implementation Details\n- **types_1.go** - pkg/apis/core/types.go changes\n- **types_2.go** - staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go changes\n- **validation.go** - API validation changes\n- **taints.go** - Taint utility validation changes\n- **utils.go** - kubectl taint command validation changes\n- **taint.go** - Scheduler filter changes\n- **reconciler.go** - EndpointSlice controller changes\n- **resource.go** - E2E test framework changes\n\n## Files in This Directory\n\n### Documentation Files\n| File | Purpose | Size |\n|------|---------|------|\n| README.md | This file - overview and guide | - |\n| MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md | Comprehensive overview of all changes | 11K |\n| PATCH_GUIDE.md | Detailed before/after patches for each file | 15K |\n| FILES_INDEX.md | Complete mapping of all modified files | 10K |\n| COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md | Ready-to-apply code snippets | 15K |\n\n### Code Snippet Files\n| File | Source File | Change Type |\n|------|------------|-------------|\n| types_1.go | pkg/apis/core/types.go | Type definition addition |\n| types_2.go | staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go | Type definition addition |\n| taints.go | pkg/util/taints/taints.go | Validation update |\n| utils.go | staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go | Validation update |\n| validation.go | pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go | Validation update |\n| taint.go | pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go | Scheduler filter update |\n| reconciler.go | staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go | Endpoint logic addition |\n| resource.go | test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go | Test framework update |\n\n## What Gets Modified\n\n### 8 Files Total\n\n1. **Type Definitions** (2 files)\n   - Define the new `TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic` constant\n   - Location: Before `TaintEffectNoExecute` in each types file\n\n2. **Validation** (3 files)\n   - Accept `NoScheduleNoTraffic` as valid taint effect\n   - Update validation logic in taint utilities and API validation\n\n3. **Core Logic** (2 files)\n   - Prevent scheduling (scheduler filter)\n   - Exclude from endpoints (reconciler logic)\n\n4. **Testing** (1 file)\n   - Update E2E test framework to understand new effect\n\n## Implementation Summary\n\n### Change Pattern\n\nAll changes follow one of these patterns:\n\n**Pattern 1: Constant Definition**\n```go\nTaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic TaintEffect = \"NoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n```\n\n**Pattern 2: Validation Check**\n```go\nif effect != v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule &&\n   effect != v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule &&\n   effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic &&  // Added\n   effect != v1.TaintEffectNoExecute\n```\n\n**Pattern 3: Filter/Switch Case**\n```go\ncase core.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n     core.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n     core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic,  // Added\n     core.TaintEffectNoExecute:\n```\n\n**Pattern 4: New Conditional Logic**\n```go\nif node != nil && !service.Spec.PublishNotReadyAddresses {\n    for _, taint := range node.Spec.Taints {\n        if taint.Effect == corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic {\n            // Skip pod from endpoints\n            continue\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n## How to Apply Changes\n\n### Option 1: Manual Patching\n1. Open each source file in the kubernetes repository\n2. Locate the lines specified in PATCH_GUIDE.md\n3. Apply the before/after changes shown\n4. Verify syntax and formatting\n\n### Option 2: Using Provided Code Snippets\n1. Reference files in this directory (types_1.go, taints.go, etc.)\n2. Compare with COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md\n3. Copy/paste relevant sections into source files\n4. Adjust indentation and context as needed\n\n### File-by-File Instructions\n\n#### Step 1: Type Definitions (2 files)\n- **File 1**: `pkg/apis/core/types.go` at line ~3177\n  - Insert new constant after `TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule`\n  - Reference: `/workspace/types_1.go`\n\n- **File 2**: `staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go` at line ~3519\n  - Insert same constant as File 1\n  - Reference: `/workspace/types_2.go`\n\n#### Step 2: Validation Functions (3 files)\n- **File 3**: `pkg/util/taints/taints.go` at line ~82\n  - Update condition in `validateTaintEffect`\n  - Reference: `/workspace/taints.go`\n\n- **File 4**: `staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go` at line ~121\n  - Update condition in `validateTaintEffect`\n  - Reference: `/workspace/utils.go`\n\n- **File 5**: `pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go` at lines ~3858-3879\n  - Update switch case and validValues slice\n  - Reference: `/workspace/validation.go`\n\n#### Step 3: Core Logic (2 files)\n- **File 6**: `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/taint.go` at line ~26\n  - Update `DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc`\n  - Reference: `/workspace/taint.go`\n\n- **File 7**: `staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go` at line ~207\n  - Add new conditional block\n  - Reference: `/workspace/reconciler.go`\n\n#### Step 4: Testing (1 file)\n- **File 8**: `test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go` at line ~422\n  - Update taint filtering in test helper\n  - Reference: `/workspace/resource.go`\n\n## Verification Steps\n\n### After Applying Changes\n\n1. **Syntax Check**\n   ```bash\n   cd kubernetes-repo\n   go build ./pkg/apis/core/...\n   go build ./staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/...\n   go build ./pkg/scheduler/...\n   go build ./staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/...\n   ```\n\n2. **Unit Tests**\n   ```bash\n   go test ./pkg/util/taints/...\n   go test ./pkg/apis/core/validation/...\n   go test ./pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/helper/...\n   ```\n\n3. **Integration Tests**\n   ```bash\n   ./hack/run-tests.sh\n   ```\n\n4. **E2E Tests**\n   ```bash\n   # After building the image\n   ./hack/gke-e2e.sh --test-grep=\"Taint\"\n   ```\n\n## Behavior Details\n\n### When NoScheduleNoTraffic is Applied\n\n1. **Scheduler Behavior**\n   - Pods cannot be scheduled on the node\n   - Requires matching toleration: `NoScheduleNoTraffic`\n   - Soft constraints not applied (hard rejection)\n\n2. **Endpoint Behavior**\n   - Pods on the node are excluded from Service EndpointSlices\n   - Service traffic is not routed to the node\n   - Respects `PublishNotReadyAddresses` service flag\n\n3. **Pod Behavior**\n   - Existing pods are NOT evicted\n   - Pods can continue running if already present\n   - New pods cannot be scheduled (unless tolerated)\n\n### Comparison with Other Effects\n\n| Effect | Prevents Scheduling | Evicts Pods | Excludes Endpoints |\n|--------|-------------------|------------|------------------|\n| NoSchedule | Yes | No | No |\n| PreferNoSchedule | Soft | No | No |\n| NoExecute | Yes | Yes | N/A |\n| **NoScheduleNoTraffic** | **Yes** | **No** | **Yes** |\n\n## Testing the Implementation\n\n### Manual Test\n\n1. Create a node with the taint:\n   ```bash\n   kubectl taint nodes node-1 traffic=disabled:NoScheduleNoTraffic\n   ```\n\n2. Try to schedule a pod:\n   ```bash\n   kubectl run test --image=nginx\n   # Should fail to schedule on node-1\n   ```\n\n3. Create a tolerating pod:\n   ```bash\n   cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -\n   apiVersion: v1\n   kind: Pod\n   metadata:\n     name: tolerant\n   spec:\n     tolerations:\n     - key: traffic\n       operator: Equal\n       value: disabled\n       effect: NoScheduleNoTraffic\n     containers:\n     - name: app\n       image: nginx\n   EOF\n   ```\n\n4. Verify endpoints:\n   ```bash\n   kubectl get endpoints\n   # Verify pod is not in service endpoints\n   ```\n\n## Key Implementation Points\n\n### Enforcement Points\n1. **Scheduler** - Prevents scheduling (pkg/scheduler)\n2. **EndpointSlice Controller** - Excludes from traffic (staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice)\n\n### Validation Points\n1. **Taint Utilities** - Validates taint specs\n2. **Kubectl Command** - Validates taint command flags\n3. **API Validation** - Validates API requests\n\n### Test Points\n1. **Unit Tests** - Validate individual components\n2. **Integration Tests** - Validate interactions\n3. **E2E Tests** - Validate full behavior\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### \"undefined TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic\"\n- Ensure both types.go files are updated\n- Check package paths are correct\n- Rebuild the project\n\n### \"unsupported taint effect\"\n- Ensure all validation functions are updated\n- Check all three validation files are modified\n- Look for any hardcoded effect lists\n\n### Pods Still Scheduling on Node\n- Verify scheduler filter (taint.go) was updated\n- Check pod lacks matching toleration\n- Verify taint is actually applied to node\n\n### Pods Still in Endpoints\n- Verify reconciler.go was updated\n- Check node has the taint applied\n- Verify PublishNotReadyAddresses is false\n\n## Documentation References\n\n- **MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md**: Overview and context for each change\n- **PATCH_GUIDE.md**: Detailed before/after for manual patching\n- **FILES_INDEX.md**: Complete file mapping and implementation flow\n- **COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md**: Ready-to-apply code snippets\n\n## Code References\n\nAll code snippets are available in this directory:\n- `/workspace/types_1.go` - Type definition 1\n- `/workspace/types_2.go` - Type definition 2\n- `/workspace/taints.go` - Taint validation\n- `/workspace/utils.go` - Kubectl validation\n- `/workspace/validation.go` - API validation\n- `/workspace/taint.go` - Scheduler filter\n- `/workspace/reconciler.go` - Endpoint logic\n- `/workspace/resource.go` - Test framework\n\n## Support\n\nFor each file, reference:\n1. The documentation files (*.md) for understanding\n2. The code snippet files (*.go) for exact changes\n3. COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md for context and surrounding code\n\n## Summary\n\nThis implementation adds support for the `NoScheduleNoTraffic` taint effect to Kubernetes v1.30.0 by:\n\n1. Defining the constant in type files\n2. Accepting it in all validation layers\n3. Including it in scheduler's rejection filter\n4. Excluding nodes with this taint from service endpoints\n5. Supporting it in E2E test frameworks\n\nAll changes are backward compatible and purely additive.\n\n---\n\n## File Organization\n\n```\n/workspace/\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 README.md                          # This file\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md           # Overview of all changes\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 PATCH_GUIDE.md                     # Before/after patches\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 FILES_INDEX.md                     # File mapping reference\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md         # Complete code snippets\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 types_1.go                         # pkg/apis/core/types.go\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 types_2.go                         # staging/.../api/core/v1/types.go\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 taints.go                          # pkg/util/taints/taints.go\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 utils.go                           # staging/.../kubectl/.../utils.go\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 validation.go                      # pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 taint.go                           # pkg/scheduler/.../helper/taint.go\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 reconciler.go                      # staging/.../endpointslice/reconciler.go\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 resource.go                        # test/e2e/framework/node/resource.go\n```\n\nEach file in this directory corresponds to a section of source code in the Kubernetes repository. Use the documentation files to understand the changes and the code snippet files as references.\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/README.md"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/README.md"
71. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /workspace/IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md << 'EOF'\n# Implementation Checklist: NoScheduleNoTraffic Taint Effect\n\nUse this checklist to track your implementation progress as you apply changes to the Kubernetes v1.30.0 repository.\n\n## Phase 1: Pre-Implementation\n- [ ] Read README.md\n- [ ] Review MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md\n- [ ] Examine PATCH_GUIDE.md\n- [ ] Verify you have access to kubernetes v1.30.0 repository\n- [ ] Create a feature branch for changes\n\n## Phase 2: Type Definitions (Critical - Must Do First)\n\n### File 1: pkg/apis/core/types.go\n- [ ] Locate line ~3177 (after TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule)\n- [ ] Reference: `/workspace/types_1.go`\n- [ ] Add TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic constant with comment\n- [ ] Verify indentation matches surrounding code\n- [ ] Check constant is placed before TaintEffectNoExecute\n- [ ] Compile: `go build ./pkg/apis/core/...`\n- [ ] Syntax verified: \u2713\n\n### File 2: staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go\n- [ ] Locate line ~3519 (after TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule)\n- [ ] Reference: `/workspace/types_2.go`\n- [ ] Add same TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic constant as File 1\n- [ ] Verify indentation matches surrounding code\n- [ ] Check constant is placed before TaintEffectNoExecute\n- [ ] Compile: `go build ./staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/...`\n- [ ] Syntax verified: \u2713\n\n## Phase 3: Validation Functions (Order Matters)\n\n### File 3: pkg/util/taints/taints.go\n- [ ] Locate line ~82 (validateTaintEffect function)\n- [ ] Reference: `/workspace/taints.go`\n- [ ] Update condition: add `&& effect != v1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic`\n- [ ] Verify condition is in single if statement\n- [ ] Compile: `go build ./pkg/util/taints/...`\n- [ ] Test: `go test ./pkg/util/taints/...`\n- [ ] Tests passed: \u2713\n\n### File 4: staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/pkg/cmd/taint/utils.go\n- [ ] Locate line ~121 (validateTaintEffect function)\n- [ ] Reference: `/workspace/utils.go`\n- [ ] Update condition: add `&& effect != corev1.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic`\n- [ ] Note: uses corev1 package, not v1\n- [ ] Verify condition matches taints.go pattern\n- [ ] Compile: `go build ./staging/src/k8s.io/kubectl/...`\n- [ ] Tests passed: \u2713\n\n### File 5: pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go\n- [ ] Locate lines ~3858-3879 (validateTaintEffect function)\n- [ ] Reference: `/workspace/validation.go`\n- [ ] Update switch case: add `core.TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic,`\n- [ ] Verify position in case list\n- [ ] Update validValues slice: add traffic=disabled:NoScheduleNoTraffic-`\n- [ ] Verify pod appears in endpoints after taint removal\n\n### E2E Testing\n- [ ] Run E2E tests: `./hack/gke-e2e.sh --test-grep=\"Taint\"`\n- [ ] All tests {
  "command": "cat > /workspace/DIRECTORY_MANIFEST.txt << 'EOF'\n================================================================================\n                 NoScheduleNoTraffic Taint Effect Implementation\n                         Complete File Manifest\n================================================================================\n\nPROJECT: Kubernetes v1.30.0 Enhancement\nPURPOSE: Add support for NoScheduleNoTraffic taint effect\nVERSION: 1.0\nCREATED: 2026-03-02\n\n================================================================================\n                              DOCUMENTATION FILES\n================================================================================\n\n1. README.md (4.2K)\n   PURPOSE: Overview and quick start guide\n   CONTENT: How to use this package, file organization, testing instructions\n   STATUS: Ready to use\n\n2. MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md (11K)\n   PURPOSE: Comprehensive overview of all changes\n   CONTENT: \n   - Overview and behavior explanation\n   - Detailed changes for each of 8 files\n   - Implementation details\n   - Files created in /workspace listing\n   SECTIONS:\n   - File Modifications (with inline code snippets)\n   - Summary of Changes (table format)\n   - Implementation Details\n   STATUS: Complete\n\n3. PATCH_GUIDE.md (15K)\n   PURPOSE: Detailed before/after patches for manual application\n   CONTENT:\n   - 8 complete patches with line numbers\n   - Before and after code for each file\n   - Change details for each patch\n   - Summary table of all changes\n   - Testing recommendations\n   - Verification checklist\n   STATUS: Ready for manual patching\n\n4. FILES_INDEX.md (10K)\n   PURPOSE: Complete mapping and reference guide\n   CONTENT:\n   - File location and line numbers\n   - File relationships diagram\n   - Implementation flow diagram\n   - Code modification patterns\n   - Testing touchpoints\n   - Quick reference tables\n   STATUS: Reference documentation\n\n5. COMPLETE_CODE_REFERENCE.md (15K)\n   PURPOSE: Ready-to-apply code snippets with context\n   CONTENT:\n   - Complete function definitions\n   - Before and after code for each modification\n   - Full context for reconciler changes\n   - Summary of changes table\n   - Implementation order\n   - Testing instructions\n   - Troubleshooting guide\n   - Rollout plan\n   STATUS: Ready for implementation\n\n6. IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md (6K)\n   PURPOSE: Step-by-step tracking of implementation progress\n   CONTENT:\n   - 10 phases with detailed checkboxes\n   - Pre-implementation checks\n   - Phase-by-phase tasks\n   - Build verification steps\n   - Testing procedures\n   - Code quality checks\n   - Notes section\n   STATUS: Tracking tool\n\n7. DIRECTORY_MANIFEST.txt (This file)\n   PURPOSE: Complete file listing and organization\n   CONTENT: This manifest\n   STATUS: pattern as taints.go, uses corev1)\n   STATUS: Ready to apply\n\n5. validation.go (1.2K)\n   SOURCE: pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go\n   LINE: ~3858-3879\n   FUNCTION: validateTaintEffect\n scheduling filter\n   PATTERN: Update return condition with additional ||clause\n   STATUS: Ready to apply\n\n7. reconciler.go (2.1K)\n   SOURCE: staging/src/k8s.io/endpointslice/reconciler.go\n
